creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Thu Jan 16 18:07:20 2014
New Revision: 339953
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339953
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r339953/

Log:
  - Update from 0.3.7 to 0.3.8
  - Use options helpers properly
  
  PR:		ports/185505
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/audio/qsynth/Makefile
  head/audio/qsynth/distinfo
  head/audio/qsynth/pkg-plist

Modified: head/audio/qsynth/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/qsynth/Makefile	Thu Jan 16 18:05:51 2014	(r339952)
+++ head/audio/qsynth/Makefile	Thu Jan 16 18:07:20 2014	(r339953)
@@ -2,9 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qsynth
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.8
 CATEGORIES=	audio
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}%20%28stable%29/${PORTVERSION}
+MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Qt fluidsynth front-end application
@@ -15,16 +15,14 @@ LIB_DEPENDS=	libfluidsynth.so:${PORTSDIR
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	GRADIENT SYSTEM_TRAY
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	GRADIENT SYSTEM_TRAY
-
 GRADIENT_DESC=		Gradient eye-candy
-GRADIENT_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--disable-gradient
-
+GRADIENT_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	gradient
 SYSTEM_TRAY_DESC=	System-tray icon
-SYSTEM_TRAY_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--disable-system-tray
+SYSTEM_TRAY_CONFIGURE_ENABLE=	system-tray
 
+USES=		gmake
 USE_QT4=	gui linguist_build moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
 QT_NONSTANDARD=	yes
-USES=		gmake
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	ac_cv_path_ac_moc=${MOC} \
 		ac_cv_path_ac_uic=${UIC} \

Modified: head/audio/qsynth/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/qsynth/distinfo	Thu Jan 16 18:05:51 2014	(r339952)
+++ head/audio/qsynth/distinfo	Thu Jan 16 18:07:20 2014	(r339953)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (qsynth-0.3.7.tar.gz) = 5f6c40179285a2be54ecbed4956525d8c2a3e16c6343024e558e22920c5147fe
-SIZE (qsynth-0.3.7.tar.gz) = 243979
+SHA256 (qsynth-0.3.8.tar.gz) = 3c372b820915e9d385d9e6b5f0abe26dc83ace080765de01a0a28f845930b872
+SIZE (qsynth-0.3.8.tar.gz) = 254448

Modified: head/audio/qsynth/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/qsynth/pkg-plist	Thu Jan 16 18:05:51 2014	(r339952)
+++ head/audio/qsynth/pkg-plist	Thu Jan 16 18:07:20 2014	(r339953)
@@ -6,4 +6,5 @@ share/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/qsynth.pn
 %%DATADIR%%/qsynth_es.qm
 %%DATADIR%%/qsynth_fr.qm
 %%DATADIR%%/qsynth_ru.qm
+%%DATADIR%%/qsynth_sr.qm
 @dirrm %%DATADIR%%
